blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
